name: senati-swe-ai-s5-platform-web-api

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.test: npm run test -w backend && npm run test -w frontend

description: Tienda virtual full stack (frontend, backend, MySQL) en monorepo.
